title: Notice of Garret Street road closure to Bay View
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Half width construction in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Half width construction in Garret Street and the closure of access to Bay View will continue until the 20th March 2025 to complete roadworks.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Half width construction in Garret Street and the closure of access to Bay View will continue until the 20th March 2025 to complete roadworks."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Access will be limited to Local Businesses in Garret Street during this period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care- fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care- fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
